data.title: Modular System
data.description: Apple's website design is organized into modular sections that allow for easy updates and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Built using a combination of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript frameworks.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site's architecture ensures compatibility with a variety of devices and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes media queries and fluid grid layouts.

data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Seamless integration with Apple's cloud services enhances performance and data accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Leverages iCloud APIs and cloud-based content delivery networks.

data.title: Global Infrastructure
data.description: The website maintains localized versions and supports multiple regions and languages.
data.technical_spec: GeoDNS and server localization for optimal performance across regions.

data.title: Security-first Approach
data.description: Designed with robust security protocols, emphasizing user data protection.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates SSL/TLS encryption and secure authentication mechanisms.
